CustomField.description: Select the party to send invoices to. Based on the selection, contact details will populate on the Bulk Invoicing screen from either the 'Lessee' or 'Invoiced Party'. For invoice parties, please ensure the record exists on the parties related list on the contract.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the party to send invoices to. Based on the selection, contact details will populate on the Bulk Invoicing screen from either the 'Lessee' or 'Invoiced Party'. For invoice parties, please ensure the record exists on the parties related list on the contract.
CustomField.label: Bill To Party
